slides.title: Problem
slides.body: Learners in Bangladesh lack high-quality Bengali-first, career-oriented learning pathways with localized contextualization and practical project practice.

slides.title: Solution
slides.body: Fixeth: an AI-powered, Bengali-first adaptive LMS combining video intelligence, graph-based concept reasoning, and personalized learning paths.

slides.title: Why Now
slides.body: Mass availability of LLMs, improved speech-to-text, and vector search enable RAG-driven, personalized learning experiences for non-English learners.

slides.title: Product Demo
slides.body: Interactive guided video workspace, quizzes, notebook, and mentor agent that uses transcript RAG to answer questions.

slides.title: Market Opportunity
slides.body: Large underserved Bengali-speaking learner market across universities, upskilling bootcamps, and enterprise training.

slides.title: Business Model
slides.body: Subscription plans for learners, enterprise licensing, and partner integrations with colleges and bootcamps.

slides.title: Traction
slides.body: Pilot users, curriculum partnerships, sample metrics (engagement, completion) — replace with live metrics after sync.

slides.title: Competition
slides.body: Generic LMS and English-first AI tutors. Fixeth differentiates by Bengali-first UX and concept-graph mastery.

slides.title: Go-To-Market
slides.body: Campus partnerships, localized content creators, referral programs, and enterprise pilots.

slides.title: Vision
slides.body: Democratize high-quality career-track learning for Bengali speakers globally.

sections.title: Product Overview
sections.body: Fixeth is a Bengali-first, adaptive learning platform that uses video intelligence, RAG, and curriculum agents to create personalized learning paths. Target users: college students, early-career developers, and upskillers.

sections.title: Feature Matrix (live)
sections.body: Feature matrix is live-synced from the features table. See /api/feature-matrix for current status.

sections.title: Technology Stack
sections.body: Frontend: Vite React, shadcn/ui, Tailwind. Backend: Next.js 14 (API-only), Supabase (Postgres + pgvector). Agents: MCP agents (Curriculum, Tutor, Assessment).

sections.title: Data & AI Provenance
sections.body: Data sources: Supabase DB, scraped public job boards, uploaded transcripts, and third-party APIs. Models: Anthropic/Claude, OpenAI/GPT, local BYOA options. Responsible AI: provenance, PII scrubbing, prompt governance. See [docs/PROMPTS.md](https://github.com/rafsan-j/Fixeth/blob/main/docs/PROMPTS.md) and [docs/PROVENANCE.md](https://github.com/rafsan-j/Fixeth/blob/main/docs/PROVENANCE.md) for details.

sections.title: Roadmap
sections.body: Short: stabilize docs editor, add PDF export. Mid: version diffs, audit logs. Long: multi-tenant docs and per-track pitch decks.

sections.title: Changelog
sections.body: v0.1 - Seeded live docs and pitch deck. Edit via /docs/admin.
